_source: FMCSA regulations, CDL manual, Commercial driver training materials, DOT compliance guides
_note: Long-tail CDL knowledge. Hours of service, air brake systems, pre-trip inspection, regulations, endorsements.

property_carrying_70_hour_rule.driving_limit: 11 hours driving after 10 consecutive hours off duty
property_carrying_70_hour_rule.on_duty_limit: 14 hours on-duty window; once started, must complete within 14 hours; driving not permitted after 14th hour
property_carrying_70_hour_rule.cycle_limit: 60 hours in 7 days or 70 hours in 8 days; choose at company start
property_carrying_70_hour_rule.34_hour_restart: Reset to 0 hours with 34 consecutive hours off duty; can be used once per week if includes two 1am-5am periods
property_carrying_70_hour_rule.30_minute_break: Required after 8 cumulative hours driving; must be at least 30 min off duty or sleeper berth
property_carrying_70_hour_rule.sleeper_berth: Split sleeper provision: 7/3 or 8/2 split; neither period counts against 14-hour clock if both total 10 hours

passenger_carrying_60_hour_rule.driving_limit: 10 hours driving after 8 consecutive hours off duty
passenger_carrying_60_hour_rule.cycle_limit: 60 hours in 7 days or 70 hours in 8 days
passenger_carrying_60_hour_rule.no_sleeper_berth: Sleeper berth provision not available for passenger carriers

eld_electronic_logging.required: Most commercial drivers; exceptions for pre-2000 trucks, driveaway-towaway, short-haul exempt
eld_electronic_logging.duty_status: Off duty, sleeper berth, driving, on duty not driving; automatic detection of driving
eld_electronic_logging.edits: Driver can propose edits; carrier must review; both annotate; maintain paper logs as backup for 8 days
eld_electronic_logging.malfunctions: If ELD malfunctions, revert to paper logs; must be repaired within 8 days

violations_penalties.log_falsification: Can result in CDL disqualification, fines up to $11,000, criminal charges
violations_penalties.hours_violation: Out-of-service order (immediate); CSA points (affects safety rating); fines $1,000-$11,000
violations_penalties.form_and_manner: Incomplete logs, missing signatures, not current; $100-$1,000 per violation

components.air_compressor: Belt or gear-driven from engine; compresses air to 120-125 PSI; governed to cut out at max pressure
components.air_tanks_reservoirs: Store compressed air; wet tank (first, collects moisture), primary (rear brakes), secondary (front/tractor brakes)
components.air_dryer: Removes moisture from air; prevents freezing in cold weather; purges when compressor cuts out (loud 'psssh')
components.brake_chambers: Convert air pressure to mechanical force; push rod extends to apply brakes
components.slack_adjusters: Lever arm on brake chamber; amplifies force; automatic (self-adjusting) or manual (require periodic adjustment)
components.brake_shoes_drums: Friction material presses against rotating drum; heat dissipation critical
components.spring_brakes: Spring applies brake, air releases; used for parking/emergency; yellow diamond knob on dash
components.relay_valves: Speed up brake application on trailer; react to tractor brake signal

system_operation.charging: Compressor runs until pressure reaches 120-125 PSI (cut-out); restarts at 100-105 PSI (cut-in)
system_operation.service_brakes: Foot pedal; applies air to brake chambers; graduated pressure control
system_operation.parking_brake: Yellow diamond knob; releases spring brakes; DO NOT use while moving (can damage)
system_operation.emergency_brake: Red octagon knob; releases spring brakes on tractor; automatic if air pressure drops below 20-40 PSI
system_operation.trailer_brakes: Blue knob/lever; hand valve; applies trailer brakes only; use for trailer jackknife prevention on slippery roads

static_leak_test.procedure: Build to 120 PSI; shut off engine; release parking brake; apply and hold service brake
static_leak_test.acceptable: Pressure drop <3 PSI in 1 minute (single vehicle) or <4 PSI (combination); more = leak, find and repair

applied_leak_test.procedure: Build to 120 PSI; shut off engine; apply service brake fully; hold 1 minute
applied_leak_test.acceptable: Pressure drop <3 PSI in 1 minute (single) or <4 PSI (combination)

pre_trip_checks.brake_adjustment: Check pushrod travel; should be <1 inch (manual slack adjusters) or <2 inches (auto); excessive travel = out of adjustment
pre_trip_checks.low_air_warning: Should activate at 60 PSI or above; usually buzzer and red light; test by running engine, pumping brakes
pre_trip_checks.spring_brake_activation: Should activate between 20-40 PSI; parking brake pops out automatically; test by depleting air with engine off

troubleshooting.air_pressure_builds_slowly: Worn compressor, air leak (check all fittings, tanks, hoses), governor malfunction
troubleshooting.excessive_moisture_in_system: Faulty air dryer, frequent short trips (doesn't heat up), drain tanks daily in humid/cold weather
troubleshooting.brakes_dragging: Parking brake not fully released, kinked hose, contaminated air (oil, water) in system, sticking brake chamber
troubleshooting.brake_fade: Excessive heat from prolonged braking; use lower gear on downgrades; driver error, not equipment fault
troubleshooting.uneven_braking: Out-of-adjustment brakes, oil-contaminated shoes, slack adjuster binding on one side

engine_compartment.fluid_levels: Oil (full mark), coolant (full cold), power steering (full), windshield washer (at least 3/4)
engine_compartment.belts: Not frayed, cracked, or loose; 1/2 to 3/4 inch play on longest span
engine_compartment.hoses: No cracks, bulges, leaks; connections tight
engine_compartment.air_compressor: Mounted securely, no leaks, drive belt in good condition
engine_compartment.leaks: Check ground under truck; oil, fuel, coolant, or hydraulic leaks
engine_compartment.wiring: Secure, not frayed, no exposed wires

cab_and_controls.gauges: All working; oil pressure builds within seconds of starting; temperature in normal range; voltmeter/ammeter shows charging
cab_and_controls.warning_lights: Check all illuminate at key-on, then go out after engine starts (except ABS indicator if trailer not connected)
cab_and_controls.mirrors: Clean, adjusted, secure; can see down both sides of trailer and behind
cab_and_controls.steering: Play <10° (approximately 2 inches on 20-inch wheel); no binding, jerking, or hard spots
cab_and_controls.horn: Test; must be audible from 200 feet
cab_and_controls.wipers_washers: Blades not torn, clean windshield effectively; washer reservoir full and functioning
cab_and_controls.lights_signals: 4-way flashers, turn signals, high beam, headlights, clearance lights, identification lights

wheels_and_tires.tread_depth: 4/32 inch minimum on steer axle; 2/32 inch on all other axles; use tread depth gauge or penny test
wheels_and_tires.tire_condition: No cuts, bulges, exposed cords, flat spots, mismatched sizes; dual tires not touching
wheels_and_tires.wheel_fasteners: All present, no cracks around lug nut holes, rust trails indicate looseness, use wrench to check tightness
wheels_and_tires.valve_caps: Present and tight on all tires
wheels_and_tires.hub_oil_seals: No leaks, not over-full (can blow out seals when hot)
wheels_and_tires.spacers: Present and not damaged (between dual wheels)

suspension_and_brakes.springs_air_bags: Not broken, shifted, or missing; air bags inflated (no sagging); u-bolts tight
suspension_and_brakes.torque_rod_arms: Not cracked or damaged; bushings not worn
suspension_and_brakes.brake_drums: No cracks longer than half the width of friction area; not excessively worn (can overheat)
suspension_and_brakes.brake_hoses: Not cracked, chafed, or leaking; properly routed (not rubbing)
suspension_and_brakes.slack_adjusters: 90° to pushrod when brakes released; pushrod travel <1-2 inches when applied
suspension_and_brakes.brake_chambers: Mounted securely, no leaks, no damage or dents

fifth_wheel.position: Not too far forward (turns hit cab); platform tilts down toward rear of tractor
fifth_wheel.condition: No cracks in frame or mounting; securely mounted to tractor frame
fifth_wheel.locking_jaws: Closed around kingpin; safety latch engaged; no gap between upper and lower fifth wheel
fifth_wheel.release_handle: Secured in locked position; not bent or damaged
fifth_wheel.grease: Plate greased; prevents wear and binding during turns

coupling_system.kingpin_apron: Not bent, cracked, or broken; apron plate secure
coupling_system.air_lines: Glad hands locked and sealed (no air leaks); correct colors (blue service, red emergency); no kinks or damage
coupling_system.electrical_connection: 7-way plug secure, not corroded; check trailer lights work
coupling_system.landing_gear: Fully raised, no missing parts, crank handle secured, no damage to legs

hazmat_h.requirement: TSA background check, written test, renewal every 5 years
hazmat_h.placards: Required if transporting >1,001 lbs of hazmat or any quantity of Table 1 materials
hazmat_h.shipping_papers: Must be within driver's reach; describe hazmat first; emergency response number required
hazmat_h.emergency_procedures: Know ERG (Emergency Response Guidebook); isolate area; notify authorities; don't touch spilled material
hazmat_h.parking: Cannot park within 300 feet of open fire, bridge, tunnel (loaded); safe haven parking at designated areas

tanker_n.requirement: Written test; for vehicles with tank capacity >1,000 gallons (aggregate if multiple tanks)
tanker_n.liquid_surge: Baffles reduce but don't eliminate; brake early and gently; partially full tanks are worst
tanker_n.high_center_of_gravity: Increased rollover risk; take curves slowly; posted speed limits may be too fast for loaded tanker
tanker_n.outage: Space left in tank for liquid expansion; typically 5%; more in hot weather or if transporting heated material
tanker_n.emergency_procedures: Product leaking? Isolate area; if on fire, stay upwind; tanker rollovers = hazmat incident (usually)

doubles_triples_t.requirement: Written test; for pulling two or three trailers
doubles_triples_t.coupling_sequence: Check converter dolly wheels chocked; back under second trailer; secure dolly; connect air lines last
doubles_triples_t.uncoupling_sequence: Disconnect air lines first; unlock pintle hook; pull out from under second trailer
doubles_triples_t.offtracking: Rear trailer wheels track inside front trailer on turns; allow extra room; longer combination = more offtracking
doubles_triples_t.backward_amplification: Rearmost trailer sways most; doubles/triples more unstable than single; avoid sudden steering/braking

passenger_p.requirement: Written test and skills test; for vehicles designed to carry 16+ passengers (including driver)
passenger_p.standees: Allowed on buses; must stay behind standee line; prohibited on interstate routes
passenger_p.railroad_crossings: MUST stop 15-50 feet before tracks; look and listen; open door to hear; proceed in low gear (don't shift on tracks)
passenger_p.emergency_exits: Mark clearly; demonstrate to passengers; keep aisles clear; emergency roof hatches on most buses
passenger_p.passenger_management: No standing in front of standee line; baggage secured; no smoking; disruptive passengers = stop safely, get help

school_bus_s.requirement: Written test, skills test, background check; most restrictive endorsement
school_bus_s.loading_unloading: Activate red lights 100-300 feet before stop; extend stop arm; count students on/off; check mirrors
school_bus_s.railroad_crossings: MUST stop, open door, look and listen; turn off radio and passengers quiet; proceed only when clear
school_bus_s.special_dangers: Students crossing in front of bus; students bending down to pick up items (can't see them); loading zone risks
school_bus_s.evacuation_drills: Required; practice emergency exits; rear door, roof hatches, windows; know procedures

drug_and_alcohol.pre_employment: Drug test required before first drive
drug_and_alcohol.random: 50% of drivers tested annually for drugs, 10% for alcohol; unannounced
drug_and_alcohol.post_accident: Required if fatality, or driver receives citation + injury or vehicle towed
drug_and_alcohol.reasonable_suspicion: If supervisor observes behavior/appearance indicating drug/alcohol use
drug_and_alcohol.bac_limit: 0.04% while on duty; 0.00% within 4 hours of duty; refusal to test = same as positive

medical_certification.validity: 2 years typical; 1 year if certain conditions (high BP, diabetes); 3 months if temporary condition
medical_certification.requirements: Vision 20/40 each eye (with correction); 70° peripheral; distinguish red/green/amber; hearing 5-foot whisper test or audiometric
medical_certification.disqualifying: Insulin-dependent diabetes (waiver available), seizure disorder, current alcohol/drug use, untreated sleep apnea
medical_certification.self_certification: Interstate (requires FMCSA medical card) or intrastate (state rules); must update state when medical status changes

vehicle_maintenance.pre_trip_inspection: Required before every trip; driver must be satisfied vehicle is safe
vehicle_maintenance.post_trip_inspection: Must complete driver vehicle inspection report (DVIR) if defects found; list defects, sign
vehicle_maintenance.carrier_responsibility: Review DVIR, certify defects corrected or not needing correction before next trip
vehicle_maintenance.annual_inspection: Commercial vehicles must pass annual inspection; display sticker; inspection every 12 months

weight_limits.federal_limits: 80,000 lbs gross vehicle weight; 34,000 lbs tandem axle; 20,000 lbs single axle
weight_limits.bridge_formula: Limits weight based on axle spacing; closer axles = lower limit; prevents bridge damage
weight_limits.state_variations: Some states allow higher weights on designated roads; check before operating
weight_limits.overweight_penalties: Fines per pound over; out of service until weight reduced; can lose license for repeated violations

cargo_securement.aggregate_working_load: Sum of all tie-downs must be ≥50% of cargo weight; 10,000 lb cargo = 5,000 lb WLL minimum
cargo_securement.minimum_tie_downs: 1 if <5 ft and <1,100 lbs; 2 if 5-10 ft; 2 + 1 per 10 ft if >10 ft
cargo_securement.edge_protection: Required if tie-down could be cut by cargo edge; prevents weakening straps
cargo_securement.header_board: Front wall rated for cargo; prevents forward movement; ≥3,000 lbs per square foot against cargo
cargo_securement.inspection_intervals: Within first 50 miles, every 150 miles or 3 hours, after break
